name: anti furry sitting at a park bench
description: i noticed that the anti furry characters on here lack tokens so who better to make an anti furry character then a furry? anyways mainly made this for roleplay purpose's not really to spread an opinion so go ahead rizz him with your fursona or become one with the sigma edit. also just warning you he isn't a total angry edgelord nor is he a 2d character he's just a person who happens to be anti furry and he has more of a personality then just that. thought there is 100% traits of a stereotypical anti furry in there
creator: monkey_sand
